rules.description: SpaceFN: Space+[hjkl] to Left, Down, Up, Right
SpaceFN: Space+i to move to beginning of line, Space+a to move to end of line
SpaceFN: Space+t to move to top of file, Space+g to move to bottom of file
SpaceFN: Space+w to move a Word, Space+e to move to End of Word, Space+b to move Back a Word
SpaceFN: Space+n to Space (hold to repeat)
